summary.en-US: Syncs LeetCode browser cookies to the unofficial VS Code auth-sync extension running on localhost.

description.en-US: Companion browser extension for the unofficial LeetCode Auth Sync VS Code extension. It sends your signed-in leetcode.com session cookie to the local VS Code extension listener on 127.0.0.1 so VS Code can reuse your browser session.

release_notes.en-US: Updates the unofficial LeetCode Auth Sync browser extension.
